pageContext.name: Hogwarts Decorative Goblet
pageContext.description: Celebrate your loyalty to the famed Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry, the setting for Harry Potter and fellow magical students, with this impressive and sturdy officially licensed decorative, collectible goblet. Cast in the finest stone resin and all hand-painted, this sculpted goblet includes a stainless-steel insert with wide lip as well as accents of faceted clear faux gemstones.  The Hogwarts School was founded by four Houses, each of which is represented with a symbol in the sculpted bas relief Hogwarts heraldic emblem featured on all panels of this goblet. Gryffindor House (to which Harry Potter belongs) was founded by Godric Gryffindor and is represented by the Lion in the fire colors of red and gold. Gryffindor members are considered brave and daring. Slytherin House (to which Draco Malfoy belongs) was founded by Salazar Slytherin and is represented by the Serpent in water colors of green and silver. Slytherin members are considered cunning and ambitious. Ravenclaw House (to which Luna Lovegood belongs) was founded by Rowena Ravenclaw and is represented by the Eagle in air colors of blue and bronze. Ravenclaw members are said to be wise and intellectual. Hufflepuff House (to which Cedric Diggory belongs) was founded by Helga Hufflepuff and is represented by the Badger in earth colors of yellow and black. Hufflepuff members are considered loyal and hard-working.  The motto for The Hogwarts School, sculpted onto the banner at the bottom of the emblem, reads: Draco Dormiens Nunquam Titillandus , which translated from Latin language, says: 'Never tickle a sleeping dragon'. The goblet includes a stainless-steel inserted cup holding approximately 10 oz. The stainless-steel cup may be cleaned carefully by hand without exposing the stone resin to any liquids. Celebrate your school spirit with this goblet representing the pinnacle of magical learning and add it to your Harry Potter collectibles display today.
